title: Purely Romantic Thai Cherries Khao Soi
description: A Whole30-friendly, earthy, and romantic Thai dish featuring dried cherries and a cheese-pull, served in the form of khao soi, grilled to perfection on a robata grill.

ingredients.name: egg noodles
ingredients.notes: made from rice flour and coconut milk

instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, red curry paste, fish sauce, and lime juice.
Add the sliced grass-fed beef to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers and grill on the robata grill for 5 minutes per side.
While the beef is grilling, cook the egg noodles according to package instructions.
In a large saucepan, combine the cooked noodles, rehydrated dried cherries, and chopped cilantro.
Pour the curry sauce over the noodles and stir to combine.
To serve, place the grilled beef on top of the noodles and garnish with thinly sliced scallions.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve immediately.
